posts.author: tcraig (Tayla Craig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to use the custom key option, but I want it to paste as a link with the friendly URL behind it. So essentially, I want to copy it as the custom key and paste and it display as an already linked custom key.

Jira does this, I know it’s possible.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to ensure I am able to copy the custom key and it paste as DEV-098, but it already be linked to the friendly url
